competition.title: Competitions
competition.notFoundDesc: The link may be invalid or the competition has been removed.
competition.registrationLinkDesc: Share this link with competing pairs so they can register directly.
competition.shareLink: Share this link with competing pairs so they can register directly.

deleteDialog.title: Delete competition?
deleteDialog.description: {{name}} will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

settings.contactEmailDesc: Displayed to participants on the public competition page.
settings.rulesDesc: Displayed on the public competition page. Include rules, technical requirements, etc.
settings.rulesPlaceholder: The competition follows WDSF rules. Each pair may compete in one age category...
settings.pairsVisibilityDesc: Controls who can see the list of registered pairs on the public competition page.
settings.numberOfRoundsDesc: Rounds are named automatically: Round 1, Round 2… The last round is always the final.

section.title: Sections
section.noSections: No sections yet. Add a section to configure age groups and dances.
section.paymentInfoPlaceholder: Account number, IBAN, payment note, variable symbol...
section.noRounds: No rounds yet. Create a preliminary or final round to start the competition.
section.presenceNotClosed: Presence for this section has not been closed yet

pairs.title: Pairs
pairs.openRegistrationDesc: Pairs will be able to register via the public link. Competition status will be changed to Registration open.
pairs.closeRegistrationDesc: Pairs will no longer be able to register. Registration can be reopened at any time.
pairs.subject: Subject
pairs.checkinLinkDesc: Open this link on a phone or tablet at the entrance.
pairs.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, number or club...

judges.title: Judge Tokens
judges.description: Share QR codes with judges. After scanning they log in without registration.
judges.noTokens: No tokens. Create tokens for judges.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete judge token?
deleteConfirm.description: The token will be permanently deleted. The judge won't be able to log in. This action cannot be undone.

createDialog.title: Create judge tokens
createDialog.description: Each judge gets a unique link + QR code. After scanning they log in without registration.

fallbackDialog.title: Fallback scoring — enter on behalf of judge
fallbackDialog.note: Note: Scores entered here will be marked as "Entered by proxy" in the audit log.
fallbackDialog.auditNote: Note: Scores entered here will be marked as "Entered by proxy" in the audit log. This action is logged and cannot be undone.
fallbackDialog.callbackDesc: In the current round, select which pairs to callback by entering their start numbers or checking them off in the judging interface after the round is opened.
fallbackDialog.finalRoundDesc: For final rounds, enter placement order (1st, 2nd, 3rd…) per dance.
fallbackDialog.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Judge device failure, entered by chief adjudicator

news.title: News
news.noNews: No news yet. Add the first announcement for participants.

publicCompetition.pairsPrivateDesc: Log in with your dance account to view registered pairs.
publicCompetition.notFoundDesc: The link may be invalid or the competition has been removed.
publicCompetition.payBeforeDeadline: Please pay before the registration deadline.
publicCompetition.confirmationSent: Confirmation was sent to your email.

publicRegister.emailHint: We will send your registration confirmation to this email
publicRegister.gdprText: I agree to the processing of personal data for the purpose of organising and running the competition.
publicRegister.notOpenDesc: Registration for this competition is not currently active.
publicRegister.payBeforeDeadline: Please pay before the registration deadline.
publicRegister.confirmationSent: Confirmation was sent to your email.

auth.name: Name
auth.validationPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
auth.newPasswordDesc: Choose a strong password for your account.
auth.resetFailed: Reset failed. Link may have expired.
auth.emailSentDesc: If {{email}} exists, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
auth.verifyEmailDesc: We sent a verification link to {{email}}.
auth.verifyEmailPrompt: Please verify your email address to continue.

publicReg.registrationClosedDesc: Registration for this competition is not currently available.
publicReg.emailHint: We will send registration confirmation to this email
publicReg.gdprConsent: I consent to processing of personal data for the purpose of organizing and running the competition.

settings.title: Settings
settings.profileAndSecurityDesc: Manage your account details and security settings
settings.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
settings.disable2faPrompt: Enter your authenticator code to disable 2FA:
settings.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
settings.privacyGdprDesc: Manage your personal data in accordance with GDPR regulations.
settings.exportMyDataDesc: Download all personal data we hold about you (JSON format).
settings.requestDeletionDesc: Request permanent deletion of your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
settings.requestDeletionConfirm: Are you sure you want to request account deletion? This is irreversible and may take up to 30 days.
settings.deletionRequestedDesc: We will process your request within 30 days and notify you by email.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.createFirst: Create your first competition to get started.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.insightsDesc: Insights and statistics across all competitions

participants.title: Participants
participants.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, club or number...

round.roundOpened: Round opened — judges can now submit
round.closeRoundConfirm: Close round? Judges will no longer be able to submit.
round.collisionDesc: Multiple pairs are tied at the cutoff position. The majority vote cannot determine a clear boundary. Choose how to resolve:
round.collisionTied: Pairs tied at the cutoff — cannot determine who advances
round.collisionNote: This may happen when multiple pairs receive equal preference marks from judges.

results.title: Results
results.approveConfirm: Approve and publish results? This will be visible to all participants.
results.noSummaryDesc: Run the calculation after all final round votes are submitted.
results.fullRankings: Full rankings — click a row to expand Skating System detail
results.pendingApprovalDesc: Review the rankings above. Once approved, results will be visible to all participants and the scoreboard.
results.presentNavHint: ← → or Space to navigate · Esc to exit

diplomas.title: Diplomas
diplomas.noCompleted: No completed sections yet. Diplomas will be available once results are approved.

presence.title: Presence
presence.description: Check-in of participants on competition day
presence.closePresenceDesc: Pairs will be divided into two groups. Presence and payments cannot be changed after closing.
presence.reopenPresenceToastDesc: You can now edit presence and payments.
presence.closedToastDesc: Pairs have been divided into groups.
presence.unpaidWarning: Warning: {{count}} present pairs with unpaid entry fee
presence.unpaidWarningDesc: These pairs are not included in the "Present and paid" group.

scoreboard.resultsWillAppear: Results will appear here as sections complete.
scoreboard.loadErrorBody: Try refreshing the page or check your connection.

competitionDetail.analyticsAfterEnd: Analytics will be available after the competition ends.

competitionDetail.paymentMethodsSub: How and where to pay — bank transfer, cash, online payment.

newSection.paymentInfoHint: This information will be shown to pairs after registering to the section.

seed.title: Seeder
seed.notAvailableDesc: The seeder is only available when

sessionExpiry.title: Session expiring soon
sessionExpiry.description: Your session will expire in {{count}} minute{{plural}}. Save your work and extend your session.

crisis.withdrawalWarning: Results will be automatically recalculated after withdrawal.
crisis.withdrawn: Pair withdrawn — results will be recalculated
crisis.penaltyPointsHint: Points added to the pair's total sum (worse ranking)

wizard.step0Desc: Name and venue of the competition
wizard.nameRequired: Name must be at least 3 characters
wizard.endDateOrder: End date must be the same as or later than the start date
wizard.step2Desc: Add competition sections. You can also add them any time later.
wizard.noSectionsHint: No sections yet. You can skip and add them later.
wizard.step3Desc: Add news for participants. Can be added any time later.
